title: Verify dependency-safe report deletion
preconditions: History contains an original, multiple linked Restatements, a leaf, an unknown identity, and a prior backup.
steps: Attempt original deletion, delete leaves to root, retry each key, reuse a key with changed target, inspect Deletion Events, advance time without delete, and inspect the prior backup.
expected: Referenced targets are RESTRICTed; leaves delete atomically with one metadata-only event; retries are stable; no automatic cleanup occurs; existing backup remains unchanged.
